decisions.rationale: Group_sidebar_ border-right (ir/slices/styles.json border_width_right: 1) is applied via bubbleStyle then suppressed by border-r-0 for shadcn Sidebar integration. layout_notes call out the right border, but criteria_audit AC-1 and ui_evidence Group_sidebar_ pass — bgcolor, padding, and style_ref wiring are correct. Reconciling Bubble border token var(--color_aiRNbAaxgw_default) with shadcn sidebar-border without double edges belongs in SHELL-05-app-shell-layout when sidebar mounts beside main content; SHELL-05 depends_on on SHELL-02 is satisfiable with the current composable (nav routes, active state, data-bubble-id markers all pass).

Lucide icons on nav links differ from Bubble [fa] phosphor prefixes on ai_RNbBHWkZ/kc/kf/ki/kl, but SHELL-02 ACs require IR label copy, Link_nav_ style_ref, and routing — not icon library parity. ui_evidence on all five nav links passes. Mirrors SHELL-01-offline-banner C-2 deferral: glyph parity is optional visual polish; no downstream depends_on gates on icon set choice.

IR places crisis CustomElement bTIfa as sibling of ai_RNbBHWkU under sidebar root; React maps bTIfa to SidebarFooter below nav. SHELL-02 scope covers mode indicator and primary nav links only — crisis card markup is a prototype placeholder pending CRISIS-01-crisis-support-reusable, which explicitly owns bTIfa sidebar-def mount and shared CrisisSupportCard export. DOM order parity matters for parity tooling, not for SHELL-05 depends_on (sidebar composable mount with data-bubble-id ai_RNbBKLUe).

coverage preflight.gaps still lists pre-implementation deficiencies now resolved (all criteria pass at 100%); files_changed omits NavLink.tsx though preflight.existing_files_found includes it and review criteria_audit AC-2 cites NavLink active-state behavior. Coverage-artifact housekeeping for audit traceability only — does not reduce coverage_pct, fail criteria_audit, or block SHELL-05 depends_on gate.

summary: 0 fix_now, 4 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 Group_sidebar_/shadcn border reconciliation (SHELL-05-app-shell-layout); C-2 nav icon glyph parity (optional polish); C-3 bTIfa DOM order (CRISIS-01-crisis-support-reusable); C-4 coverage preflight/files_changed refresh (artifact hygiene).
